_comment: FAB banking policies reference document (AgentMesh 15.0.6.2026). Documents the RBAC model and banking policy boundaries. For live regulatory and product policy content, ingest authoritative documents into RAG-as-a-Service.

rbac_model.description: FAB AgentMesh role-based access control model

roles.name: customer
access: Own account information and transaction history
restrictions: Cannot access internal margin or profitability analytics

roles.name: relationship_manager
roles.description: FAB Relationship Manager — manages customer portfolios
access: Deal pricing recommendations and compliance flags
Profitability and margin analysis for managed accounts
restrictions: Cannot access customers outside managed portfolio without approval
Cannot override pricing policy floors without Credit Officer sign-off

roles.name: branch_operations_officer
roles.description: FAB Branch Operations Officer — handles day-to-day branch operations
restrictions: Cannot access credit risk or RWA analytics

roles.name: credit_officer
roles.description: FAB Credit Officer — credit risk and loan approval
access: RWA impact and Basel III capital metrics
restrictions: Cannot modify pricing policy floors without Risk Committee approval
Cannot access HR or platform administration functions

roles.name: compliance_officer
roles.description: FAB Compliance Officer — regulatory compliance and audit
access: AML and KYC policy and procedures
Pricing compliance flags across all customers
restrictions: Read-only access to customer data — cannot modify records

roles.name: operations_manager
roles.description: FAB Operations Manager — operational oversight and reporting
restrictions: Cannot access individual customer account details

roles.name: platform_administrator
roles.description: FAB Platform Administrator — full AgentMesh platform access
access: All banking data and knowledge for platform operations

pricing_policy_boundaries.description: High-level pricing governance rules. Detailed floors and ceilings are maintained as documents in RAG-as-a-Service.

rules.name: Pricing Floor Compliance
rules.guideline: All approved deal prices must be at or above the product-specific pricing floor set by the Risk Committee. Deals priced below the floor are flagged as non-compliant and require Credit Officer sign-off.

rules.name: Margin Adequacy
rules.guideline: Net margin on all deals must exceed the minimum margin threshold after accounting for funding cost, risk premium, and relationship discount. Deals below minimum margin require escalation.

rules.name: Discount Cap
rules.guideline: Relationship discounts are capped at the policy-defined maximum. Discounts exceeding the cap trigger a compliance flag and require senior approval.

rules.name: RWA Capital Adequacy
rules.guideline: All deals must be evaluated for RWA-weighted capital impact under Basel III. Return on RWA must meet the minimum hurdle rate defined by the Finance Committee.

data_privacy.description: Customer data handling requirements under UAE data protection regulations

rules.name: Customer Data Isolation
rules.guideline: Customer-role users may only query their own account data. Cross-customer data access requires Relationship Manager or higher role.

rules.name: PII Redaction
rules.guideline: All responses are automatically screened for PII (email, phone, Emirates ID, credit card numbers) before delivery. Detected PII is replaced with REDACTED tokens.

rules.name: Audit Trail
rules.guideline: Every query, agent hop, and tool call is recorded in the audit trail with user identity, role, timestamp, and outcome. Audit logs are retained per UAE Central Bank regulatory requirements.
